lineDescription: Vivante Natives 330g Candle Labels - 65mm Square||Size: 65mm x 65mm||Material: Manter Crystal Salt||Print: 6 Colours||Tool: D0134(6,4)(0,1)0.6mm Square||Provided on 76mm Cores||Finishing: MATTE VARNISH||MACHINE APPLIED||Supply: MOD 200mm||Qty: 6000||1,500 x Native Boronia PANTONE 2340||1,500 x Finger Lime Myrtle PANTONE 466||1,500 x Coastal Tea Tree PANTONE 5767||1,500 x Honey Wattle PANTONE 124||
